passage: Prior authorization required for all advanced imaging services including MRI, CT, and PET scans. Clinical criteria: documented medical necessity with peer-reviewed evidence, failed conservative treatment documentation, and site-of-care justification. Narrower approval criteria requiring additional clinical documentation compared to previous policy version.

Prior authorization required for advanced imaging services. Clinical criteria: documented medical necessity with supporting clinical notes. Broad approval criteria with standard documentation requirements.
Outpatient procedures should be performed in the lowest-cost appropriate setting. Hospital outpatient departments require site-of-care justification when ambulatory surgery center alternatives exist.

Updated outpatient surgery authorization criteria require site-of-care review for all procedures with ambulatory alternatives. Documentation must include clinical justification for hospital-based setting.
